name: Old South Benne Seed Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Line cookie sheets with foil.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine butter, brown sugar, egg, self-rising flour, and vanilla extract.
4. Beat until well mixed.
5. Stir in toasted sesame seeds.
6. Drop dough onto the foil-lined baking sheets using about 1/2 teaspoon for each cookie.
7. Space cookies about 2 inches apart.
8. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until cookies are lightly browned.
9. Remove from sheets immediately and cool on racks.
